name: Backflow Rate % (Weekly)
query:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('week', v_facts.full_date)::date AS week_start,
    ROUND(AVG(v_facts.value)::numeric, 1) AS backflow_rate_pct
FROM metrics.v_facts
WHERE v_facts.calc_code = 'backflow_column_rate'
  [[ AND {{issue_type}} -- ]] AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
  [[AND {{project_key}}]]
  [[AND {{date_range}}]]
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', v_facts.full_date)::date
ORDER BY week_start ASC
